title: Make This Image Photorealistic Keep Color Grading
sourceTitle: Make This Image Photorealistic Keep Color Grading

imagePrompts.prompt: Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.

imagePrompts.title: Make This Image Photorealistic Keep Color Grading

prompt: Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
originalPrompt: Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.

promptTranslations.zh: 使该图像逼真，保持颜色分级相同，真实的纹理和物体，超真实的人体皮肤，保持纵横比相同，制作 3 个版本。
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Make this image photorealistic, keep the color grading the same, REALISTIC TEXTURES AND OBJCTS, ultra realistic human skin, KEEP THE ASPECT RATIO THE SAME, make 3 versions.
promptTranslations.ru: Сделайте это изображение фотореалистичным, сохраните прежнюю цветовую градацию, РЕАЛИСТИЧЕСКИЕ ТЕКСТУРЫ И ОБЪЕКТЫ, ультрареалистичную человеческую кожу, СОХРАНИТЕ СООТНОШЕНИЕ СООТНОШЕНИЙ ОДИНАКОВОЕ, сделайте 3 версии.
promptTranslations.pt: Torne esta imagem fotorrealista, mantenha a gradação de cores igual, TEXTURAS E OBJETOS REALÍSTICOS, pele humana ultra realista, MANTENHA A RELAÇÃO DE ASPECTO A MESMA, faça 3 versões.
promptTranslations.ja: この画像を写真のようにリアルにし、カラー グレーディングを同じに保ち、リアルなテクスチャとオブジェクト、超リアルな人間の肌、アスペクト比を同じに保ち、3 つのバージョンを作成します。
promptTranslations.ko: 이 이미지를 사실적으로 만들고, 색상 그레이딩을 동일하게 유지하고, 사실적인 질감과 개체, 매우 사실적인 인간 피부를 유지하고, 종횡비를 동일하게 유지하고, 3가지 버전을 만듭니다.
